panels.description: Node Graph replacement for the previous Canvas schematic

targets.query:
import "array"

pv = from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pv_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

soc = from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_soc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

load = from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_load_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

grid = from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_grid_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

array.from(rows: [
  {id: "pv", title: "PV power", subtitle: "Inverter 1 + 2", mainstat: float(v: pv._value), secondarystat: "W", color: "#EAB839", nodeRadius: 45.0},
  {id: "ems", title: "EMS state", subtitle: "Controller", mainstat: 0.0, secondarystat: "active", color: "#73BF69", nodeRadius: 30.0},
  {id: "battery", title: "Battery SoC", subtitle: "Average state", mainstat: float(v: soc._value), secondarystat: "%", color: "#5794F2", nodeRadius: 45.0},
  {id: "grid", title: "Total grid power", subtitle: "Inverter 1 + 2", mainstat: float(v: grid._value), secondarystat: "W", color: "#FF9830", nodeRadius: 45.0},
  {id: "load", title: "Total load power", subtitle: "Inverter 1 + 2", mainstat: float(v: load._value), secondarystat: "W", color: "#F2495C", nodeRadius: 45.0}
])

import "array"

pv = from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pv_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

soc = from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_soc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> mean(column: "_value")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

load = from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_load_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

grid = from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "total_grid_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

array.from(rows: [
  {id: "pv-ems", source: "pv", target: "ems", mainstat: float(v: pv._value), secondarystat: "PV to EMS", thickness: 3.0, color: "#EAB839"},
  {id: "ems-battery", source: "ems", target: "battery", mainstat: float(v: soc._value), secondarystat: "Battery SoC", thickness: 2.0, color: "#5794F2"},
  {id: "ems-grid", source: "ems", target: "grid", mainstat: float(v: grid._value), secondarystat: "Grid exchange", thickness: 2.0, color: "#FF9830"},
  {id: "ems-load", source: "ems", target: "load", mainstat: float(v: load._value), secondarystat: "Load supply", thickness: 2.0, color: "#F2495C"}
])

panels.title: Inverter 1+2 EMS topology

targets.query:
from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_soc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "grid_voltage_l1" or r["_field"] == "grid_voltage_l2" or r["_field"] == "grid_voltage_l3")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_voltage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_current")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1" or r["asset_id"] == "inverter_2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "battery_temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["asset_id"] == "inverter_1")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total_grid_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.asset_id == "inverter_1" or r.asset_id == "inverter_2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(
      rowKey: ["_time"],
      columnKey: ["asset_id"],
      valueColumn: "_value"
    )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: (if exists r.inverter_1 then r.inverter_1 else 0.0) +
              (if exists r.inverter_2 then r.inverter_2 else 0.0)
    }))
  |> yield(name: "total_grid_sum")

from(bucket: "core")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "inverter_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total_load_power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.asset_id == "inverter_1" or r.asset_id == "inverter_2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(
      rowKey: ["_time"],
      columnKey: ["asset_id"],
      valueColumn: "_value"
    )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: (if exists r.inverter_1 then r.inverter_1 else 0.0) +
              (if exists r.inverter_2 then r.inverter_2 else 0.0)
    }))
  |> yield(name: "total_grid_sum")
